purpose: EA-Strategy-relevant chapter ranges across supporting guides — input handoff for S2.2 deep read

method.tool: regex keyword sweep over extracted JSON

keywords_arabic.doc_name: استراتيجية البنية المؤسسية | وثيقة استراتيجية البنية
keywords_arabic.strategic_kpis: مؤشرات الأداء الاستراتيجية | مؤشرات أداء استراتيجية

method.limitation: Keyword regex is conservative — may miss synonyms (e.g., 'هدف استراتيجي' singular, 'الرؤية المستقبلية'). S2.2 should read full ranges, not just hot pages.

guides.source_pdf: DGA-Resources/الدليل الاسترشادي لتأسيس ممارسة البنية المؤسسية.pdf

priority_ranges.interpretation: Likely the chapter dedicated to 'وثيقة استراتيجية البنية المؤسسية' itself — highest priority for S2.2.
Focus axes definition + alignment guidance — relevant to focus_areas + strategic_alignment containers.
Alignment cluster — likely cross-strategy linkage practice.
Scattered identity + alignment hits across governance/operating chapters.

guides.source_pdf: DGA-Resources/الدليل الاسترشادي لتطبيق المنهجية الوطنية للبنية المؤسسية-V1_0.pdf
guides.extraction_note: Required NFKC post-processing (presentation-forms PDF) — see meta.post_processed in the JSON.

priority_ranges.interpretation: Heavy 30-page concentration of alignment terms — almost certainly the chapter on cross-strategy alignment / intersections. Direct input for strategic_alignment + kpi_alignment containers.
Identity references + alignment — likely strategic-pillars or vision chapter.
Identity-only hits — possibly a values/vision template section.
Scattered hits — verify in S2.2 whether substantive or incidental references.

s2_2_reading_plan.recommendation: Start with P1 ranges in main context; delegate P2/P3 to a subagent for summary if context budget allows.
s2_2_reading_plan.subagent_strategy: If using subagent: hand it the chapter-map + the relevant extracted-JSON page slices; ask for: (a) new field candidates per container, (b) source quotes verbatim, (c) page citations.
